#2.  **External Archive**: It maintains an archive of inferior solutions recently replaced by better ones. This preserves population diversity and prevents premature convergence when using the greedy `current-to-pbest` mutation strategy.
#3.  **Adaptive Restart**: The algorithm monitors population variance and fitness stagnation. If the search converges to a local optimum or stops improving
column2: it triggers a restart to explore new areas of the search space
column3: while retaining the global best solution found so far.
